name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Reflex Dog Treats - Chewing Bacon Strips 85g
shortDescription: Reflex Dog Treats – Chewing Bacon Strips , Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour.
description: Reflex Dog Treats - Chewing Bacon Strips , Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Cereals, meat and animal derivatives, vegetable protein extracts, vegetable derivatives (0,4% inulin), various sugars, oils and fats, minerals (1% dicalciumphosphate), milk and milk derivatives. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 18 Crude Fat (%) - 5 Crude Ash (%) - 4.5 Crude Fiber (%) - 2 Moisture Content (%) - 22 Vitamin D3 - 200 IU Vitamin E - 15 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Recommended as an additional snack, ensure that fresh drinking water is always available. Please watch your dog while chewing. Store cool, dry and keep away from strong odours.
